mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, login_ip, user_agent, expires_at, created_at FROM sys_user_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT id, session_id, user_id, login_ip, user_agent, expires_at, created_at FROM sys_user_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_session (session_id, user_id, login_ip, user_agent, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent}, #{expiresAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
